overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a sunny riverbank toward a historic stone bridge and tower. The character explores the shoreline before turning inland to traverse a sandy area with shallow pools.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy riverbank with historic stone bridge ahead

events.description: character steps from dry sand into shallow river water while continuing along the shore

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy riverbank toward the distant stone bridge, briefly wading through shallow water at the edge

entered.detail: large historic stone bridge with multiple arches spanning the river
cylindrical stone tower with conical roof attached to the bridge structure
calm river water with gentle ripples along the sandy shore
wide sandy beach area with scattered pebbles and dry patches
scattered deciduous trees with full green foliage lining the riverbank
hazy blue mountains visible on the horizon beyond the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day with Geralt walking along a sandy riverbank. The historic stone arch bridge and attached watchtower dominate the distant center of the frame, while green trees line the left bank. The character briefly steps into the shallow water at the river's edge before continuing on the sand.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoreline, drawing closer to the stone bridge and tower structure while staying near the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking forward along the riverbank, with the stone bridge and watchtower growing larger as they approach. The river water remains visible on the right, and trees shift from the left to the right side of the frame as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: inland sandy area with scattered vegetation and shallow pools

events.description: character makes a sharp left turn away from the river and walks inland
character approaches and observes shallow puddles in the sandy inland terrain

agents.ego_description: turning away from the river to explore the inland area, walking through sandy terrain with scattered grass toward shallow pools

entered.detail: small pools of water collected in depressions of the cracked sandy earth
clumps of green grass and low vegetation scattered across the sandy ground
gentle sandy rises with sparse vegetation marking the inland terrain

segments.scene_description: The character turns left away from the river, causing the bridge and water to exit the frame. The scene shifts to an inland area of cracked sandy earth with scattered grassy patches. The character walks toward and observes shallow puddles collected in the terrain, with trees now visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bright riverbank that eventually shifts toward a dry, inland terrain. It begins with Geralt walking across a sandy shoreline toward a distant stone arch bridge and watchtower, briefly stepping into the shallow water at the river's edge. As the character advances, the bridge and tower grow larger in the frame while the surrounding greenery shifts from the left to the right side of the path. The scene then transitions as the character turns left away from the water, causing the river and architecture to exit the frame. Finally, the environment opens into an area of cracked sandy earth and scattered grass, where the camera follows the character toward shallow puddles collected in the terrain.
